raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.4","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The section makes an explicit, named contribution claim (unified evaluation framework, deployment-gap metric, commitment reliability frontier); reviewing requires verifying that the thesis and gap framing are coherently and accurately stated.","R1.2":"The two-level planner decomposition, asymmetric-settlement objective, and O(NT)→aggregate-distribution reduction each involve logical steps that must be internally consistent; a review must trace whether premises connect to intermediate claims and conclusions.","R1.4":"The contribution is asserted as positioning constrained RL relative to model-based coupling via two novel metrics; reviewing naturally demands assessing whether these represent a genuine delta over prior work.","R1.6":"'Review this section' canonically includes prose-level quality; the artifact contains several compressed, multi-clause sentences and abbreviated constructions that warrant sentence and paragraph evaluation."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should this review focus on technical correctness (formalization coherence, logical validity of the planner decomposition, and contribution-claim accuracy) rather than on writing quality and presentation (sentence clarity, paragraph flow, terminology consistency)?"}

rationale.R1.1: The section makes an explicit, named contribution claim (unified evaluation framework, deployment-gap metric, commitment reliability frontier); reviewing requires verifying that the thesis and gap framing are coherently and accurately stated.
rationale.R1.2: The two-level planner decomposition, asymmetric-settlement objective, and O(NT)→aggregate-distribution reduction each involve logical steps that must be internally consistent; a review must trace whether premises connect to intermediate claims and conclusions.
rationale.R1.4: The contribution is asserted as positioning constrained RL relative to model-based coupling via two novel metrics; reviewing naturally demands assessing whether these represent a genuine delta over prior work.
rationale.R1.6: 'Review this section' canonically includes prose-level quality; the artifact contains several compressed, multi-clause sentences and abbreviated constructions that warrant sentence and paragraph evaluation.

parsed.clarification_question: Should this review focus on technical correctness (formalization coherence, logical validity of the planner decomposition, and contribution-claim accuracy) rather than on writing quality and presentation (sentence clarity, paragraph flow, terminology consistency)?
